# 🌟 Windrose Sync Release

Welcome to the newest release of Windrose Sync! This update brings enhanced stability, cleaner automation, and UI polishing to your multiplayer server control panel.

### 📥 Portable Installation Instructions
1. Download the attached **`WindroseSync-Portable-Windows.zip`** from the Assets section below.
2. Extract the *entire* `.zip` folder to your desktop or desired location. **Do not move the `.exe` out of its extracted folder!** It relies on the bundled assets right next to it.
3. Drop your game's `WindowsServer` directory directly inside the same folder as `WindroseSync.exe`.
4. Run `WindroseSync.exe` and enjoy!
